candidate_llm_application: LLM safety prompt mosaic: low-intensity adversarial probes pre-burn the model's vulnerability surface to prevent catastrophic jailbreak; red-team co-evolves with model.

results.title: Adversarial Red-Teaming / Continual Safety Training: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on adversarial red-teaming / continual safety training, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
